stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the accuracy that can be obtained with the LAAS (Local Area Augmentation System) of the satellite navigation system NAVSTAR/GPS?

options.a: A LAAS cannot correct for satellite timing and orbital position error.
options.b: A LAAS corrects the position of the aircraft by relaying the information via a geostationary satellite.
options.c: The increase in accuracy of position fixes is independent of the aircraft position in relation to the LAAS ground reference station.
options.d: The closer the receiver is to a LAAS ground reference station, the more accurate is the aircraft position fix.
